title: Fire Starter
description: A cute little early game mod that lets you light fires using sticks or flint and inefficiently smelt all smeltable resources
body:
This mod adds the following items:
- wood fire starter
  - has a 1 in 4 chance of lighting a fire when right clicking
  - shapelessly crafted with two sticks
- flint fire starter
  - has a 1 in 2 chance of lighting a fire when right clicking
  - shapelessly crafted with two fling
- copper nugget
  - craftable into and from a copper ingot

As well as the following functionalities:
- Early game smelting of the three smeltable ore types on campfires
  Gold   | raw gold   -> gold nugget   | raw gold block   -> gold ingot
  Iron   | raw iron   -> iron nugget   | raw iron block   -> iron ingot
  Copper | raw copper -> copper nugget | raw copper block -> copper ingot
